tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Web_Only"
        set uuid 2a79d25e-29cd-51f1-db0d-d878529b2c1e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS"
        set utm-status enable
set ssl-ssh-profile "certificate-inspection"
        set webfilter-profile "default"
        set application-list "block-high-risk"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
